page_content:
Recommended: NEUR305.

Cross-listed with: BSCI455.

Credit Only Granted for. PSYC401, NEUR405, BSCI455 or BSCI454.

NEUR479 Advanced Research in Neuroscience (1-3 Credits)

Research and/or integrated reading in neuroscience under the direction and close supervision of a faculty member.

Prerequisite: Complete at least 3 credits of NEUR379 (or equivalent) with the same faculty member as NEUR479 credit.

Recommended: Minimum neuroscience track GPA of 3.0.
